Johnny V. immediately put me at ease, made me feel heard and comfortable, and personalized his approach to what I needed (combination of deep tissue and sports massage). Communication, technique, and pressure were all spot on. Johnny’s also just a delightful and warm person to be around, and I appreciated the feedback and practical tips he offered to extend the benefits of the massage and care for my body in between. Earlier this week, I also had a great mani-pedi with Lily P. The ambiance and service at Cocoon were exactly what I was hoping for. Upon check-in, you’re offered water, coconut water, sparkling wine, or tea and I also was handed a glass of sparkling wine post-massage. The Soma location is conveniently located within walking distance of Moscone and many hotels if you find yourself similarly in town for work and looking for some “me” time. The next time I find myself in SF, I’ll definitely be making another massage appointment with Johnny.

reviews.author: Nharizza Mopas
reviews.text: I’ve been going to Felicia for over 20 years. She is incredibly meticulous and precise—truly the best at what she does. She genuinely cares about her clients and consistently provides top-notch care. I wouldn’t trust anyone else. You can tell she puts her heart into her work and always delivers the highest level of care.

reviews.author: SLurP
reviews.text:
I should have written a review years ago. Michelle has been my go to for facials, waxing, and tanning. Also, I really like the why she has sculpted my eyebrows! It has been over ten years since I have been in her care at the SOMA location. And the Noe Valley location, where have I resided for the past ten years, is also a very good location for a spa day!
I work in SOMA, but it is really nice to have a spa appointment in my neighborhood.
Thank you, Kimi and Michellle!!!

reviews.author: Rachael Kim
reviews.text:
Felicia is absolutely incredible. I’ve had lash lifts before, but none have come close to the results I get with her. She’s meticulous, knowledgeable, and clearly takes pride in her work. My lashes come out perfectly lifted, evenly curled, and still healthy every single time—no over-processing, no frizz, just a clean, natural-looking result that lasts.

She also takes the time to understand what look you want and explains the process so you feel totally comfortable. On top of that, she’s warm, professional, and a joy to be around, which makes the whole experience relaxing and easy.

If you’re even remotely picky about your lashes (I am), Felicia is the one. Highly, highly recommend.

reviews.author: Reena Merchant
reviews.text:
Cocoon Day Spa has been my go-to spa for several years now, and I am so grateful for the kind and generous staff, and the way they take care of their customers.

Kysa always goes out of her way to accommodate my needs and she keeps an eye out for tailored skin care and beauty recommendations that might be helpful for me.

Felicia is an incredible facialist. She is one of the only people I trust with my skin. She is thoughtful, detail oriented, and leaves my skin, glowing, and my face lifted and toned after every facial.

Hannah, Emily, and the entire nail aesthetician team are phenomenal. They are extremely kind, and my manicures and pedicures are always executed with so much attention to detail.

I love this spa! I’m so happy to be a customer here and a huge thanks to the team for taking such good care of me. ❤️

services.name: Bamford Wellness Spa
services.address: 8 Mission St 8th floor, San Francisco, CA 94105, USA

reviews.author: kbdub24
reviews.text:
Now let’s give flowers to this top tier hotel!  This hotel was simply beautiful! It’s simplicity with neutral tones and nature vibes was so serene. Bamford Spa located inside the hotel was truly an experience. They literally touched mind, body and spirit! I was greeted by the most welcoming ladies. My masseuse was extremely knowledgeable, gentle, soft spoken, and applied the perfect amount of pressure. Her hands were like butter! After my massage I went for a CBD soak on the roof top! And it’s a beautiful day to start my birthday!

#1hotel #spa #massage #rooftop #soak #cbd #sanfrancisco #bayarea #bamfordspa #city #birthdaygirl #virgo #fyp #mood #discover #explore #california #travel #lifestyle #myview #hotels #wellness

reviews.author: Nicole Gandhi
reviews.text:
From the moment I arrived, Amal brought such a grounding, warm presence that truly elevated the entire experience. Her energy was calming, intuitive, and nurturing—exactly what you’d hope for in a healing space like Bamford. She took the time to explain everything with care, checked in gently without interrupting the flow, and held space in a way that felt both professional and deeply human.

The salt soak itself was serene and rejuvenating, but it was Amal’s attention to detail and genuine kindness that made it unforgettable. She has a gift—not just for wellness, but for making people feel seen, safe, and restored.

reviews.author: Aashik Patel
reviews.text: I started with a search of the best hotel with a spa in sf and I chose Bamford and they exceeded expectation. All the was welcoming and very genuine. Did the couples massage with my fiancé and it was amazing! The massages we got were honestly one of the best ones we’ve ever gotten. They offered us tea and light snacks and chocolate strawberries after the service. This place really ties into the brand and elevated the experience here at 1 Hotel.

reviews.author: Tatiyana White
reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful experience here at Bamford Wellness Spa. Did a de-stress or couple massage as well as the aromatic bath with my husband and it really was the most relaxing time. Snacks and beverages during the bath really topped it off. Can’t recommend this spa enough and can’t wait to return!

reviews.author: Sabrina Gutierrez
reviews.text: Oh my goodness! Amal has the hands of an angel. This was the best massage i've ever received in my life. The massage table was heated and extremely comfortable, the view was beautiful, and the amenities were top-shelf. Decompressing in the heated stone single bathtub in the cold San Francisco air was the perfect way to end my spa experience. After changing into a bathing suit and robe, I was greeted on the terrace to a hot bubble bath, alongside a mimosa (I opted for OJ), hot tea, some snacks and truffles, and epsom bath salts. There was even a cute little bell I could ring if I needed anything, because Amal was sure to give me my privacy on the deck while I totally drifted off. It was so luxurious! Amal is a lovely host and top-tier massage therapist - thank you so much!

services.name: Pure Organic Spa
services.address: 518 Sutter St, San Francisco, CA 94102, USA

reviews.author: Crystal McLeod
reviews.text:
Booked a last-minute massage here.
The greeting wasn't as warm when I walked in, but I did get a smile.

The experience was nice, but when massaging my feet, the therapist didn't touch my feet. She massaged it with the covers over it. That wasn't an experience I have had before and thought it was very odd.

The service served its purpose for sure for a last-minute appointment on a business trip.

The environment was also clean and quiet for the most part. It was a little colder for me in the room, but I'm from a very warm climate, so the warm bed did its best.

reviews.author: Courtney Christopher
reviews.text: seriously best massage i’ve ever had. i will definitely be going back. fyi there is no shower.

reviews.author: Senorina Colin
reviews.text: I loved this spot! Parking is hard to find in streets, but we found a valet parking lot a block away from spa. Went on a sister spa day, and it was perfect. So relaxing and just amazing. First time here, but we both booked an appointment for another massage in a month. Wish facials were available, but due to Covid they are not. Lenn and Sonia were wonderful!

reviews.author: Siobhan Glass
reviews.text: Had a great first appointment and booked a second.  The receptionist made it very clear about their stringent cancellation policy after 24-hour window has passed for customers. Yet they don't hold themselves to the same policy.  Not even an hour before my appointment, as I was in route to Pure Organic Spa, I received a call from the receptionist stating that my massage therapist was unable to do my massage.  The receptionist did not provide a suitable alternative and my appointment was cancelled.  Unfortunately, I won't be going back.

reviews.author: Stephanie
reviews.text:
I cannot wait to return, it has been over 3 months and I don't stop thinking about the amazing deep tissue I had here.  Thank you so much!! A good massage is hard to find and my masoose gave me the most considerate one I have ever had!  I can't say it enough I am really looking forward to scheduling again with him! The organic products are all really enjoyable and I appreciated the variety of scented oils to choose from,  I'm often very picky. While here I also had a facial which was pretty great, I think things could've gone better, but that happens to me
everywhere I go. The elements are all there I'll just say that much. When I return I will book the same package it was a great experience all together and I left feeling like my posture and comfort on my short walk home was improved! Amazing, truly! Please pure organic spa don't ever change, integrity in a business is so hard to find!

services.name: Alchemy Springs & Sauna Garden
services.address: 939 Post St, San Francisco, CA 94109, USA

reviews.author: Jósa Goodlife
reviews.text: nothing is fully perfect - but Alchemy Springs ALMOST is! I would give 5 stars if the sauna were as hot as my body desires, but given the fact that they are in a period of growth and expansion, I know and believe it will get better! The Yoga room has an exceptionally good acoustic for soundbaths... WOW! thanks Alchemy for existing in SF and can't wait for more adventures with you

reviews.author: Arman Jindal
reviews.text: Alchemy Springs is my favorite place. The moment you walk in, it feels like an oasis. The people who work here and who come here are wonderful. I left NYC and was seeking my 'othership' and I'm so glad to have found Alchemy, It is it's own vibe. I am excited to see how this place grows once it's actually done. The founders are excellent and I am confident they are going to keep making this place even better even though it is already at 5 stars in my book :)

reviews.author: Callan Gaines
reviews.text: Alchemy Springs is a breath of fresh air in the middle of the inner city. As a resident of Lower Nob Hill, I am sooo grateful for this space and their beautiful community. Sarah’s yoga and workshops are incredible! The Sauna Garden is a dream! You have to stop by, whether you’re a Bay Area Resident or just someone visiting SF 😍

reviews.author: Natalie Wei
reviews.text:
The best sauna SF has which doesn’t really say much given the dearth of them here. Sauna is okay but how can you really go wrong there. Found clumps of hair in cold bath which has still water containing loads of other people’s sweat.

On the upside nice selection of teas and heated chair.

reviews.author: Jocelyn Toll
reviews.text: If you're looking for a peaceful and restorative refuge in the middle of the city, Alchemy Springs is the place for you. I recently went with my bf and a friend who've been multiple times, and I wish I had come sooner. The overall experience from start to finish transported me into a state of relaxation and ease. The spaces are inviting and open, the sauna room is hot and clean, and the staff are welcoming and friendly. I loved sitting in the heated benches in the outdoor garden after the sauna and getting to know others. I'll definitely be coming back and want to do so regularly!

services.name: Cavallo Point Healing Arts Center & Spa
services.address: 601 Murray Cir, Sausalito, CA 94965, USA

photos.attribution: Cavallo Point Healing Arts Center & Spa
Cavallo Point Healing Arts Center & Spa

reviews.author: sofia mingo
reviews.text: Very very good maternity massage. The meditation pool is a must for after the massage. The only thing that was a bit uncomfortable is that they push for a 22% tip out loud. Which, taking in consideration for a 350 dollar massage seems excessive. Also food is ok but very pricy and comes to you in a “box” so no real plates. Food also includes 20% mandatory tip.

reviews.author: Orit Sarah Cohen
reviews.text:
From the moment we arrived, Cavallo Point Healing Arts Center & Spa was a sanctuary of serenity. Although we experienced a scheduling conflict initially, the team handled it with grace and professionalism, ensuring everything was resolved seamlessly.

Oscar delivered one of the best massages I’ve ever had—skilled, intuitive, and incredibly professional. Tracy, who gave me a medical facial, clearly brings years of expertise to the table. Her attention to detail and deep knowledge left my skin glowing and refreshed.

Next time, I’m booking 90 minutes with both Oscar and Tracy—because their care deserves the time to work its full magic! Highly recommend this beautiful spa retreat.

reviews.author: Ariadni Alexiadou
reviews.text:
A deeply relaxing and beautifully curated spa experience.
Cavallo Spa, part of the stunning Cavallo Lodge, offers a serene retreat surrounded by nature and very nice views. From the moment you enter, the atmosphere invites complete relaxation and disconnection from the outside world.

We especially enjoyed the warm outdoor pool and the sauna—both impeccably maintained and perfectly integrated into the tranquil setting. The highlight of the experience, however, was the massage by Julie. Her work was exceptional: deeply relaxing, highly professional, and characterized by continuous, flowing deep movements that released tension and restored balance.

Every detail reflects care, expertise, and a true commitment to wellness. Cavallo Spa is an ideal destination for anyone seeking a refined, calming, and genuinely restorative experience.

reviews.author: Amanda Z
reviews.text:
First time here & got the Cavallo Point Signature Massage (60m). Honestly the best massage I've gotten, and I get regular 30m massages (though for free, so I'm not sure how reasonable the prices are).

The Signature Massage is a Thai stretching-inspired style, but does entail some deep pressure. It's incredibly relaxing, with a perfectly heated room and a great variation of scented oils. Skyler(sp?) did an amazing job!

The tea bar is also lovely if a bit overpriced. There's complimentary peppermint tea, apples, water, a heated meditation pool and single-sex sauna + Jacuzzi. The meditation pool can be underheated in the winter but if you find a heating jet then it is amazing.

reviews.author: lucinda watson
reviews.text:
I have been a client of Cavallo Point Spa since it opened. The best part of the spa are the practitioners and if you’re lucky enough to find one that is the right fit for you it’s an amazing experience. Over the years I have seen the spa deteriorate, not only in the physical plant, but in the front desk staff who are the ones that really make the first impression.
Over the last couple of weeks, I’ve been there twice and not only are the massages quite expensive but they are now adding on a 22% gratuity and they say that it’s because they’re giving 2% to the front desk staff.
In my opinion, that is not appropriate. The gratuity should be given to the practitioner not to the front desk staff whose job it is to take care of clients. I’ve noticed that the front desk staff is not respectful nor are they professional. They often talk among themselves in front of a client and don’t greet you appropriately.  The old time practice of having a spa be a place of relaxation and serenity does not exist at Cavallo point any longer. Though I love my therapist there and will probably revisit the place, the front desk experience will undoubtedly  be stressful and not respectful.
I think one should have the choice of giving the practitioner a big tip if she is down a great job, but I do not think that 2% should be added onto a gratuity for the front desk staff who, for the most part are not polite, nor are they professional. It seems to me that it’s the hotel’s way of trying to find another way of making money which is wrong.
In my opinion, the spa should pay the front desk staff more and train them better so that they can treat clients with the respect that they deserve and then clients would not mind paying more for the service. I think that Cavallo Point has gotten away with bad service for a long time because it’s a hotel and people come and go, but for those of us who live nearby and who frequent the spa it’s really too bad that they can’t find people who are respectful and professional, so that when you leave, you actually feel good about your treatment.

services.name: Royal Thai Spa
services.address: 685 North Point St, San Francisco, CA 94133, USA

reviews.author: Shibani Bhave
reviews.text:
Thank you Jenny and Sumi for taking care of my husband and I. Our feet needed pampering and the reflexology put me to sleep for a bit which says a lot as I don’t relax very easily. We also walked in and they were able to accommodate us right away.
I’d definitely recommend to anyone wanting to take a break from life for a bit to stop by.

reviews.author: John Medina
reviews.text:
I’ve had deep tissue massages before but never a Thai deep tissue massage and I wasn’t ready for this experience. Deep tissue massage will never be the same for me, in a very good way.

Sumi & Sandy were really good massage therapists, the pressure was amazing and the whole experience was the best deep tissue we’ve had so far.

I do not think I can fairly describe this experience with a neutral and calm tone, because it was intense from start to finish. I feel like Sandy took it as a personal mission to kneed and step on every knot, ache, and pain in my body and soul. You absolutely get what you asked for with this deep tissue massage and I’d gladly do it again in the future.

This was our second time to visit Royal Thai Spa and both visits were nothing short of excellent. If you’re in the city, I’d definitely recommend booking an appointment. I’d be sore as heck later or tomorrow, but my body will thank me after.

reviews.author: Nicolette Bishop
reviews.text: My fiancé and I went for an amazing couple’s massage. They stand on your back, shoulders and legs as we got the 1 hour full body. They massage you scalp and arms and even stretch so muscles out. I did not want them to stop or to get up at all. They’re very nice and professional. Inside is so beautiful and welcoming. They give you water in fancy glasses and are just truly amazing. Definitely coming back here. This is our new massage place. Thank you!! Oh and we had Sandra and I forgot the other girl’s name but so sweet and we’re both perfect!

reviews.author: Jeannie
reviews.text: I had a wonderful Thai Massage with Jenny @ the Royal Thai Spa, San Francisco. She did an amazing job with a combination of Swedish, Shiatsu & Thai massage with the right pressure, stretching & pulling.  I highly recommend this Spa & I will definitely return.  The interior is decorated with Thai artwork  relaxing rooms in earth tones, soothing music & a lovely atmostphere.

reviews.author: Stacy Diri
reviews.text: This is such a lovely space in SF, I got the hot stone massage for the first time & Sumi the amazing masseuse did such an amazing job! She was always checking in on me to make sure the pressure wasn’t much or the stone wasn’t too hot which was so comforting. The ambience of the space is so calming and you may just fall asleep like I did from how relaxing it is lol. I will definitely be coming back and will be making this a monthly routine 😍😌

services.name: Redmint - TCM Holistic Wellness
services.address: 1958 Union St, San Francisco, CA 94123, USA

reviews.author: Olivia Zaid
reviews.text: Tanya at the Union location was absolutely amazing. It was my first time getting a lymphatic drainage massage, and she was super accommodating + walked me through aftercare post massage as well. They also gave me a few free sheet masks + tea after as well! Lovely experience all around, will definitely be back. 11/10!

reviews.author: Liana Casciani
reviews.text: Second time I’ve been to redmint, went to filmore location first. I had good lymphatic massage with Winnie. I love their facial products, I’d go back again.

reviews.author: Lana Puckett
reviews.text:
I can’t recommend Mira more highly for a facial. I’ve treated myself to her many times over the last 10 years (at her previous spa before Redmint). Most recently I saw her for the scalp and face massage facial.
She’s very intentional, soothing, and the environment and products at Redmint accentuate that. If you’re looking for an experienced, dedicated esthetician you’ll want to come back to - don’t hesitate to book Mira.

reviews.author: Caitlin Stewart
reviews.text: Best place for a massage in San Francisco. Tanya in particular is incredible and has helped me through numerous injuries. 10/10 no notes, could not recommend more.

reviews.author: Ashley Walley
reviews.text: 10/10 for Isaac’s deep tissue massage. It was transcendent, a spiritual experience. He worked out all my should/neck pain. It was the massage I want every time I get a massage and nothing has ever come close. Truly amazing. And 10/10 for vibes. You step off Union Street and all the noise fades away and you’re transported to into a tranquil oasis in the middle of the city. Total dream all around.

services.name: Zen Spa
services.address: 1595 Broadway, San Francisco, CA 94109, USA

reviews.author: Cindy Lee
reviews.text: Got a facial and massage combo from Jenny. It was so good I felt like I died and went to heaven! The receptionist was very sweet and helpful. If I lived in SF I would absolutely buy one of the packages.

reviews.author: mike hoffman
reviews.text:
Zen spa on broadway is a gem! From the front desk, meethana (sp) is genuinely happy to see me and always warmly greets me.
massage therapists, julie, michelle, and may are all simply amazing. Also have had wonderful mani and pedi here as well.
Have experienced massage all over the world and this spot just feels like home. The space itself is nice and elegant, but not at all pretentious.  Used to go to lots of other places, but this has now become my go-to place.

Come and get your love!!!

reviews.author: Sebrina Niermeyer
reviews.text: I had an amazing beauty treatment at Zen Spa! The esthetician was extremely professional and gentle, and she explained every step clearly. My skin felt so clean, hydrated, and glowing afterward. The environment is relaxing, the service is top-notch, and the prices are very reasonable for the quality. I highly recommend this place for anyone looking to improve their skin and truly relax!

reviews.author: Elana Ranhoff
reviews.text: I absolutely love going to Zen Spa! I started getting facials here in the months leading up to my wedding, and it became one of my favorite parts of the whole prep process. Anna is truly the best esthetician — she’s so knowledgeable, and makes every visit relaxing and personalized to what my skin needs. My skin has never looked or felt better!

reviews.author: Jackie Bolton
reviews.text: I booked this an hour before my appt while in SF on a work trip. Mary was so welcoming and thorough with my head spa service. Never have I been so relaxed and comfortable during a service. My hair feels weightless and so clean. If I lived here I would go every week. Try it out!

services.name: Earthbody - Massage San Francisco
services.address: 534 Laguna St, San Francisco, CA 94102, USA

reviews.author: jennykini Mao
reviews.text: Earthbody was introduced to me by my friend & colleague fellow nurse Alisa. I instantly loved it. The feel of the place is so comfortable & relaxing. Esp with Tristan as the first person you see, greets you so warmly and sets you up w a tea to prepare your body to relax. I thought they closed but got an email for a promo to come on a weekday ! I jumped on that. Got a 90 min signature massage w a facial add on with moe.  Moe takes the time to ask you what you need, how you wanna focus your time. I told him about the clicks & tension on both my shoulder muscles & he went to town on them. Usually a masseuse massages it a few times then moves on. He spent a lot of time there with hot towels and great pressure. I will be coming back! It was amazing & I felt so good after. The tea after was great with a lemon grass hot towel & even the bathroom is so nice with cloth towels to dry your hands.

reviews.author: E. S.
reviews.text:
OMG! I have been wanting to try this spot for awhile and I am happy to say I finally did. You walk into this beautiful, calming environment and instantly you are greeted by a warm friendly face. The check in process was easy and after check in, I was presented with a lovely tray with a  warm towel to cleanse my hands, DELICIOUS hibiscus herbal tea and water, and a beautiful floral arrangement..... let the pampering begin.
I started with the Earthbody Massage and added in the hot neck massage. The holiday stresses have left me a bit stiff and the universe gave me the right gal to fix me right up. Alina was amazing. We spoke about my body and concerns before beginning. She also explained the massage I chose and the neck massage - since this was my first time. This woman has magic hands. I was soo relaxed by the end of the massage it felt like I was in deep meditation. I did not want this experience to end. Next time I will enjoy the longer massage. This is such a beautiful, magical spot. My only complaint is that I haven't been sooner. Thank you soo much for the reset!

reviews.author: Gloria Tavera
reviews.text:
The best massage I've received in SF: dedicated practitioners, good communication and an overall ethos centered around holistic healing.

A one time visit is perfectly fine, but if you live here you'll likely want to make this one of many visits.

They are so good I've started going for maintenance, as a regular customer.

reviews.author: Patrick Reynolds
reviews.text: Okay, so I've had lots of massages. Some good some not so. But let me tell you, this place knows what they are doing. The intentionality is evident the moment you walk in. Their reception is a actual reception.  A warm welcome with tea, a rose, and a warm scented towel. Then there is Ish. Ish is/was my massage therapist.  Seriously one of the best massages I've had in my life. And to top it off there is aftercare. What an amazing experience.  Is it expensive? Yep, sure is. Even if you only splurge once at least you'll know what an amazing massage experience is like.

reviews.author: Nicole Harper
reviews.text: From being greeted with a cup of tea and hot towel, through an expert and very relaxing massage, to a final cup of tea of recommendations for extending the benefits of my massage at the end of the session, everything about Earthbody was perfect.  I met with Jae who expertly mixed working through my tight muscles with a truly relaxing massage.  It is the best massage I have had in a very long time and was certainly the best value massage.  My husband had a similar experience in his massage with Moe.  I think everyone here is great and I'd highly recommend a visit.

services.name: Spa J'Adore
services.address: 490 Post St STE 1701, San Francisco, CA 94102, USA

reviews.author: Dhara Waghela Sheth
reviews.text: I came in for a lymphatic massage. It was my first time and Anna was absolutely amazing! She made sure I was comfortable, asked about any sensitive spots, and talked me through it. Felt lighter and a million times better after we finished. The spa is in an unassuming building but very nice and tranquil inside, quiet and smelled wonderful. I’ll definitely be back!

reviews.author: Volha Afonina
reviews.text:
I want to say thank you  to spa Jadore for an amazing massage, care, warmth, and attention! The warm, cozy atmosphere helps me completely relax and rejuvenate. I get a massage once a week for over 4 months and I trust only this spa. I want to underline the masseuse Sarai. She is a true professional with sensitive and strong hands—she works deeply and carefully on all body. After her massage, I sleep deeply, my body feels relieved and light.
Definitely recommend to come see her and enjoy the spa vibe.

reviews.author: JD Kindall
reviews.text: Recently had a deep tissue massage with Ana that was not enjoyable and completely missed the mark of what I was expecting for a deep tissue massage. First, I was expecting a full body massage but she didn't even flip me over and do anything with me lying supine. Everything was done with me lying face down. She primarily focused on my mid back for several minutes with the same stroke until I asked her to move to another area. Barely touched my neck and shoulders and low back which I did request specifically. Also her technique was nothing I've experienced before and being a massage therapist myself I have experienced many different techniques. Her technique is one that I would never want again. She mentioned being European and being trained there which is definitely different than massages that I've received by therapists trained in America and the training that I specifically received in America. It felt like a combination of isolated deep tissue massage mixed with sports massage but not pleasing at all. The flow of the massage felt disjointed. Also the massage room was so tight that she could barely maneuver around the massage table and she leaned over me a few times and I could fee her body touching my head as she leaned over. And it was quite noisy as she tried to maneuver around the table due to bumping into things, etc. The room looked like an industrial attic with low hanging pipes that someone could actually bump their head on. This is an issue the owners need to address. Not faulting her for cramped working environment. When you enter the spa, it looks like great ambiance and the view is great from the balcony. Overall as it relates to the bodywork, I would not recommend her for anyone who's coming with traditional expectations of deep tissue or Swedish massage. She may being better suited in a chiropractor's office or in a more therapeutic environment where clients have specific health conditions/musculoskeletal issues they need addressed. My rating is 1/5. 1 is for the ambiance in the waiting area and the view from the balcony.

reviews.author: Christine Elizabeth Cusack
reviews.text: I've been coming to the spa to get massages for years now~ I've watched them renovate & upgrade the facilities & it's only gotten better. I highly recommend any of the therapists, as they cater to your needs & help you walk away refreshed. Get a lymphatic session followed by a deeper tissue when you want a full renewal! Will continue to make this spot a favorite downtown gem!

reviews.author: Daniel Floyd
reviews.text: Absolutely incredible experience at Spa J’adore! From the moment I walked in, the atmosphere was calm, elegant, and welcoming. The staff were warm, attentive, and made sure I felt completely taken care of the entire time. The space is spotless, beautifully designed, and instantly puts you at ease with relaxing music and subtle aromatherapy. My deep tissue massage was hands down one of the best I’ve ever had — the therapist knew exactly how to find and release tension while keeping everything smooth and relaxing. I left feeling lighter, recharged, and completely renewed. Spa J’adore truly delivers the perfect balance of luxury and care — an easy five-star experience all around.

services.name: CODE Salon
services.address: 561 Castro St, San Francisco, CA 94114, USA

reviews.author: Kristi
reviews.text: Went in knowing I wanted to start getting my hair back to the natural dark blonde, but wasn't prepared for how stunning and still natural Stella's work would be. My wedding is in just three months and I will ONLY book with her now. So grateful

reviews.author: Elizabeth
reviews.text:
Today I came in for my first haircut at this salon, and I’m honestly so impressed! Aric was absolutely amazing - professional, attentive, and incredibly talented. He really listened to what I wanted and made it even better than I imagined. The haircut is perfection, I’m obsessed with how it turned out!

And his hands - pure  magic! It genuinely felt like I was getting a head spa treatment, so relaxing. I left feeling refreshed, confident, and so happy with the result. I’ll definitely be coming back to Aric from now on!

reviews.author: Crystal Lynn Crawford
reviews.text: They truly did wonders for my hair! Not so much for my bank account though... Although I am extremely happy with my results, unfortunately the price is way too steep, for me personally 😞 However,  if you can afford it they really did do a fantastic job and I love it 🫶

reviews.author: Claire Bostrom
reviews.text:
I had a great experience with Kara at the salon in the Castro for a haircut, which is why I was excited to return and make this my regular spot. Unfortunately, after a negative phone interaction with the man handling administration, I feel differently.

I booked a haircut online two days in advance but later realized I had accidentally scheduled it for Tuesday instead of Wednesday. The following day—more than 24 hours before the appointment—I called and left a message through the automated system requesting to reschedule to Wednesday. I called again the next morning (still before the appointment time), reached the same automated system, and left another message asking to reschedule.

I eventually received a call back almost at my scheduled appointment time, where I was told I would be charged a 50% late cancellation fee. Despite my multiple attempts to reschedule well in advance, I was met with no understanding or flexibility. During the call, the administrator said, “Imagine showing up to work and your boss tells you that you have an hour off,” which felt dismissive and not applicable to my situation, since I was trying to reschedule—not cancel—and had reached out more than a day beforehand.

What stood out most was the lack of empathy during the interaction. At several points, I genuinely wondered whether I was speaking to an AI or a person, which was disappointing given how positive my in-salon experience had been.

I would appreciate the salon reconsidering the cancellation fee when someone makes multiple attempts to reschedule. I’d also encourage the salon to review how rescheduling requests through the automated system are handled, as well as how these situations are communicated to returning clients who genuinely want to continue supporting your business. I don't think I'll be returning.

reviews.author: Grace Emery
reviews.text: Aric was wonderful - honest but not pushy, provided science-backed information, thoughtful, and friendly. Listened to my goals and concerns and provided helpful suggestions. Gave me a wonderful haircut and blowout. Can't wait to come back in a few months.

services.name: Hairglim
services.address: 5332 Geary Blvd, San Francisco, CA 94121, USA

reviews.author: Jennifer Radilla
reviews.text: I highly recommend Gurgen! He makes you feel right at home from the start. He’s incredibly knowledgeable and takes the time to answer any questions about the treatment and aftercare, and he’s very attentive throughout the entire process. This was my first time getting an organic keratin treatment, and afterward I truly felt like a million bucks. No more bad hair days!

reviews.author: Kiekie Sermsiri
reviews.text: This review is a month overdue! I discovered Hairglim through Reddit and couldn’t be happier. George is the kindest and most attentive hair technician I’ve ever met. He took the time to listen to all my concerns and asked for recent photos of my hair and its width beforehand so he could plan the color design in advance. My hair wasn’t in great shape so he suggested bleaching only the top section to maintain its health and it turned out amazing! A month later, the color still looks vibrant and hasn’t faded or changed.

reviews.author: Jane Tsernoh
reviews.text: Amazing place! Exceptional hospitality, kindness, and most importantly — a luxurious hair repair keratin service. I’ve been searching for a place like this in the Bay Area forever. No one offers such high-quality products and service as George, the owner of Hairglim. Highly recommend — you won’t regret it! Worth every penny. Don’t even think about it twice!

reviews.author: lizandra estrada
reviews.text: George is amazing! He’s very welcoming and makes you feel comfortable from the moment you walk in. This is my second time getting a keratin treatment with him, and once again he did an excellent job. My hair came out smooth, shiny, and exactly how I wanted it. You can tell he really cares about his clients and his work. Highly recommend George if you’re looking for great results and a great experience!

reviews.author: Roshanak Aslebagh
reviews.text: I always have such a great experience at Hairglim salon! Gurgen is incredibly kind, easy to talk to, and genuinely listens to what you want and makes sure you leave happy. My hair turned out beautiful and exactly the way I hoped. I always feel completely comfortable and relaxed the moment I walk into the salon, which makes the whole experience even better!

services.name: The Lane Salon
services.address: 1821 Steiner St, San Francisco, CA 94115, USA

reviews.author: Eva Shantharam
reviews.text: I get the best haircut from this salon. How do I know this? One I feel amazing and two people always ask me where did I get my haircut. I will not say who my stylist is because I still want to be able to get an appointment with this person. I do believe everyone there is talented because I see people walk out with amazing haircuts and hair color.

reviews.author: Sandy L
reviews.text:
I’ve had my haircuts and coloring every 4-5 months done by David Y.  for many years. He is consistently excellent. He’s calm, takes the time to listen, and can offer suggestions. I have tried to find another hairstylist in the EastBay in the past so I don’t have to get off work early, and drive over to SF, but still no one comes close to David’s work. I’m sticking with David. I like how the color turns out, so natural with shine, that my friends were utterly surprised that I’ve been coloring for years! ☺️
The Lane Salon is also very nice. Clean, bright, white, and I always manage to find parking if not in front, at a side street close by.

reviews.author: Ferda Baysal
reviews.text:
Mac Claine, thank you for your excellent work. I had been searching for the right hair salon for color correction, and I’m so glad I found you. You spent a great deal of time making sure everything was done properly, and the results truly show your care and expertise.

I’d also like to thank Becca, who was responsive, professional, and very helpful while scheduling my appointment.

Thank you to The Lane Salon—I highly recommend them to anyone looking for high-quality, thoughtful work and a truly professional experience.

reviews.author: Sarah Odeh
reviews.text:
Stevie and Frank are two of the most talented people I have ever had the pleasure of I knowing. I've been working with them for about three years now and I'm always amazed by the quality of work.

Stevie is a genius with color, and takes such good care of her clients. She works hard to match the color to your skin tone to really compliment your features, and listens to what you want and need.

Frank is the only hairdresser who's ever actually given me a haircut that I am happy with and incredibly proud to show off. Very few people know how to cut thick, curly hair well but I've never left the salon unhappy. He's taught me tips and tricks to take care of my hair and manage it better so that I always look fabulous.

I am absolutely thrilled that they now have their own salon and can start building their own business. I highly recommend working with both of them for all of your needs

COVID UPDATE: They have reopened and have stellar protocol. The process that have put in place makes for a seamless entry into the salon and allows for no contract through payment. Bring a disposable mask to wear during your cut and/or color. So very happy they are back.

reviews.author: Claudia Patino
reviews.text: Ali at The Lane Salon was incredible. I came in with overgrown hair and requested layers with face framing. His precise haircut was amazing to see and his ability to hold quality conversation made it the perfect experience. The blow dry style completed the look and lasted several days. Highly recommend this salon as it was an overall great environment.

services.name: Blake Charles Salon
services.address: 77 Maiden Ln, San Francisco, CA 94108, USA

reviews.author: Cristina Miranda
reviews.text:
Unfortunately my experience was great for the haircut and terrible with the hair color. I booked a partial balayage and got highlights that look like I have butter sticks in my bangs. I had all natural color and had waited 4 years to dye it and was the worst decision I’ve made to come to this place. I paid $550 for this.

First of all, the salon booked my appointments the wrong way, first haircut then color, which they said it was going to be fine but they would just have to wash my hair twice then blowdry it after the color. Haircut amazing with Danny M, he had been my stylist before when he was at CODE. Then had my color with Daren, he was very very nice I showed him what I wanted but unfortunately it did not came to even close. He started foiling my hair, and after starting he left and came back to mention that I booked balayage but he was using the foil technique because it would look more uniformed and then tint. I trusted the advice besides he has already started, after putting the bleach he went away for about 20-30min, came back washed my hair put some tint for 10min. They proceeded to put me on a self dry station which I mentioned I was supposed to be blow dried by an assistant because of the mix up. Also how are you supposed to see how your color is with wet hair!!!

Anyways they then put me with an assistant I was hesistant about the color but everyone kept saying “it looks so good” so I thought maybe I am just tired and hungry after 4-5 hrs at the salon and it would look better once I see it in other lighting. Well it does not look better, also right before the holidays and I am about to start a new position as part of a promotion at work which is client facing 😭. I have been trying to communicate left a voice message but nothing.

Below I put pictures of my hair and the inspo. Then the bill and a picture of a color work I had professionally done 4 years ago in another salon in Mexico.

reviews.author: Christina Mendez
reviews.text:
First time visit to this Salon. Two years ago I  got a cut from someone I had never seen before, at a salon I had never been to, asked for layers, and got a botched cut!
I was super nervous about booking a cut with someone I had never seen before, but did some research and reviewed Salon ratings and ended up at Blake Charles!
I scheduled a cut with Danny M, (cut/ correction), and he nailed it! He was cool to chat with and very professional! I will be booking again! Well worth the drive from San Jose!

reviews.author: Vidya Kaipa
reviews.text: This review is far overdue but wanted to share my amazing experience with Blake Charles Salon, especially with my colorist Tanya. I had a wedding coming up and booked a last-minute color correction visit after another studio canceled the day before, and the entire experience from start to finish was truly luxurious. The front desk, consultation, color, cut, and styling were all handled with so much care and consideration, and the result was incredible. I was a bit nervous about getting my hair colored after a botch job by a stylist at another salon, but they talked me through the whole process and got me set up with a hair style that has grown out beautifully and is super low-maintenance. I've recommended Blake Charles to several people since!

reviews.author: Diana Perez
reviews.text: I had a great experience getting a haircut from Danny M! I had tried to give myself layers at home, but it didn’t turn out quite as planned. Danny knew exactly how to fix my DIY attempt and gave me a beautiful, blended cut. Even though I live in Texas now, I’ll be back for future cuts — totally worth the trip.

reviews.author: Kiara
reviews.text: Roy did an amazing job! He is so attentive and was very patient with me. I got a color and cut and received a total transformation from him. We went from washed out blonde to a mocha brunette! My entire appointment was nothing short of amazing. I highly recommend booking with him, he really makes you feel cared for. Roy will go out of his way to make sure you walk away feeling confident and happy with your results. Not only professional but just a warm and inviting individual to be around. Thank you again Roy you’re awesome

services.name: Kinship Salon & Barber
services.address: 253 Clement St, San Francisco, CA 94118, USA

reviews.author: Jennie Dinh
reviews.text: Loved my recent haircut by Marvin and overall experience. My appt included a shampoo, blowout, and style. Plus, he was very knowledgeable and answered all my questions. Highly recommend to anyone looking for great stylists and bright n airy environment. I went here once before for a shorter cut and Rae also took great care of me then. It always feels like a treat coming here!

reviews.author: Joseph Ware
reviews.text: Kinship is an outstanding Barbershop and Salon located in the heart of the Inner Richmond on Clement and 4rth. I have been getting my haircut by Renee V. for the past 10+ years and she always exceeds expectations wrt to quality, professionalism, and heartfelt connectivity. Kinship and the Inner Richmond is my ‘happy place’ in The City by The Bay. Make sure to shop locally on Clement and grab coffee (and a cookie) at Jimmy’s Danube Cafe, browse books at Green Apple, grab a burger-brat-beer at Steins, and if  you are looking for an outstanding Mediterranean Restaurant,  Kitchen Istanbul is the best!

reviews.author: Holly Lung
reviews.text: My daughter and I love our salon days at Kinship with Marvin and Shawna! From the moment we sit down, we’re guaranteed great conversation, lots of laughs, and expert care. We always leave feeling refreshed, confident, and looking absolutely lovely. It’s more than a haircut—it’s quality time, great energy, and consistently amazing results. Can’t recommend them enough!

reviews.author: Dana Manea
reviews.text: We are so lucky to have Kinship in our neighborhood! Beautiful bright space, friendly and attentive staff, talented stylists. Shawna is really sweet and gentle and has made my kid's haircut a delightful experience we both look forward to. I've been getting haircuts with Ashley for 5+ years, both short and long, and every time I feel like a million bucks after. She is kind, thoughtful and always there to support our community.

reviews.author: Lindy Ngu
reviews.text: Shawna is sweet and caring about my hair health! She experimented with my hair since I’ve been back from overseas-let’s just say my hair was under too many harsh and toxic chemicals that they she diligently had to use hair mask and resiliently nurtured my hair. It is slowly growing out and I do not see my hair melting into goop in the shower. My hair is in a lengthy process with Shawna because she does not rush the process. Exemplifying chemical bond integrity through lightening process and different things I can do to maintain the health of my genetic and premature grays speaks more to me than what is stated on outside a hair box product. I like her witty and sunflower personality she is always a highlight of my monthly visits. I always look forward to our nurturing conversations and what my hair will end up to be. I’m stoked I’ve walked in that early summer day and that they accepted me in a chaotic and complex hair journey, from South Asia ocean bleached, jungle and forested adventures, and formaldehyde treated hair. They were still open to such a client. Khob khun ka hairstylist alchemist Shawna!

services.name: bliss organic salon
services.address: 6209 Geary Blvd, San Francisco, CA 94121, USA

reviews.author: Hollo Rose
reviews.text: I decided to get some peekaboo highlights, and wanted a red-to-pink ombre. It came out so BEAUTIFULLY -- John is a really good hairstylist and works with you so well on your vision for the hairstyle you want. He's also very transparent on the products he applies on for you; I highly recommend styling your hair at his place! It's such a friendly and welcoming atmosphere in there :)

reviews.author: nicole
reviews.text: John is such an incredible hair stylist! I recommend him to everyone in the area. He did a gorgeous balayage on me before, and now that it's grown out, we did a lovely lived-in coppery look. I like discussing my hair ideas with him and hearing what techniques he thinks will make it look best. His studio has such a beautiful, calming energy as well. His shampoo bowl setup is also the most comfortable I've ever experienced - it's so ergonomic and doesn't feel like your neck is hanging off. Love love love the products he uses too!

reviews.author: Annyred Roldan
reviews.text: I have the best experience that I could  have revitalizing my natural curls John not only made me feel welcome with his service but the results are absolutely stunning the environment is beautiful and clean he is so professional and talented he uses the best organic and vegan products (everything smells delicious) he did some highlights and I got to be honest I was a bit nervous because I know how aggressive the procedure can be on your hair but when uses the best products and techniques your hair gets even more beautiful and alive. I highly recommend him if you are considering on treating your self with the best knowledge and professional colorist and hair designer. I am so happy and need it to share my results and experience.

reviews.author: cheyenne •
reviews.text: I had such an amazing experience today with John after desperately searching for a good salon, and I’m so glad I found him! The salon is beautiful and it’s obvious that he takes so much pride in his work and the products he uses. The products are all organic and you can feel the difference from the moment you walk in. He gave me exactly what I asked for and was so thoughtful and lovely to talk to. Already looking forward to my next appointment! ❤️

reviews.author: Zoya Furman
reviews.text: I have an appointment today with John. I very satisfied with his job. Like color and haircut. Recommend this gentleman!

services.name: Arthur Sebastian Hair Salon
services.address: 2285 Union St, San Francisco, CA 94123, USA

reviews.author: Radha Blackman
reviews.text:
I've been getting my hair cut by Helen for 4-5 years (started seeing her at her previous salon). My hair is multi-textured and unpredictable, and I don't have much time to spend with it, so I need something that looks great, wash and go with minimal styling. Helen does a fantastic job with this, usually I get a dry cut, and her promise to give a cut that looks great between cuts has proven true. I get compliments even close to the time I need my next cut.

She has a good balance of listening to what I want and making great suggestions that work well for me.

reviews.author: Diane Jiang
reviews.text:
Had my first haircut with helen and she was the best! Definitely the best salon I've gone to in San Francisco. From the start, Helen was so kind and accommodating - I came in for a cut, but she also gave me recommendations for my wedding hair, how to cut my hair in prep for that, and tips on how to manage my hair.

Helen is super detailed and works magic. She had me turn my head, stand up, and ensured my hair looked good from every angle during our session. strongly recommend her - she's also so sweet and easy to talk to!

reviews.author: Rachel Chung
reviews.text: Love seeing Arthur for my haircuts! He listens to what I want but also weighs in on what would suit my face shape, etc. which I appreciate so much. Here’s a pic of my new chic bob!! Tysm Arthur :’)

reviews.author: Mary Ellen Beaudreault
reviews.text: Flew into town for  a week with family (with gray roots).  My DIL recommended Arthur for cut and color and he did not disappoint. Covered my grays and tweaked my toner for a gorgeous color.  Need to take back the formula!  Very cute cut too.  Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Nicole Lee
reviews.text: Very lucky to have met Helen who is such an artist in her craft. I’ve been going to her since her days at Yoyo salon, and she’s always taken incredibly great care of my hair. I fully trust her with my hair evolution, from long to a bob cut. Her attention to detail with coloring leaves me impressed everytime! Also she’s just a pleasure to talk to, great energy always. I look forward to seeing her every time I’m in need of a hair pick me up. Thank you Helen!

services.name: May's Hair Design
services.address: 746 Clement St, San Francisco, CA 94118, USA

reviews.author: Matthew Dusanic
reviews.text:
For my entire life I've never been happy with a haircut. I've tried all different price points, and have had it cut in a dozen different states or countries, to no avail. That is, until I got my first cut from May, about four years ago.

Right before a wedding, I went all out on a cut that I hated so much, I ran to May's before she closed, as that was the only place near enough, that was still open. Suffice to say she saved my day!

I have refused to get a cut anywhere else, since. She makes it look easy! I only get my hair cut about twice a year. Every single time, May comes through!

reviews.author: Brenda Yip
reviews.text: Fot the first time I had a haircut that I really liked., thanks to May! She  is very friendly and the price is reasonable. highly recommend!!!

reviews.author: Michele Wynne
reviews.text:
After reading all of the great reviews, I came in for a cut before heading off for vacation. May was just finishing up with a very satisfied customer and was able to take me right away. She was so cheerful and sweet. I love my cut and the price was very reasonable. I will definitely be back when I need a refresh.
Highly recommend.

reviews.author: mausami tamang
reviews.text: I had my hair colored with May, she is so detailed and friendly. Price is so reasonable too

reviews.author: Angel Carmack
reviews.text: I’ve been going to Mays for a few years now. She always does a great job! Great prices and good vibes inside.

services.name: The Heart Salon
services.address: 2157 Clement St, San Francisco, CA 94121, USA

reviews.author: Heather Salmons
reviews.text: Had my hair done today by the owner Erin and it was great! She was so sweet and attentive. I felt like I was in good hands the entire time! Such a cute cozy space, they even had art and vintage clothing to shop too!

reviews.author: Sarah Gale
reviews.text: Taylor is warm, attentive, and highly skilled! I enjoyed my appointment start to finish and love my new cut. Such a beautiful salon with lovely artwork and good lighting.

reviews.author: Caroline Saca
reviews.text: I’ve lived in SF 10+ years, but new to The Richmond so decided to give the salon a try. I recently finished chemotherapy for breast cancer and this was my first haircut. I was paired with Heather who was patient collaborative, and professional. I was open about having issues with how my hair was regrowing, styling, texture etc. Heather was honest with what was possible and gave me advice on treatments and styling options. The ambiance was mellow and a welcoming neighborhood spot. I will definitely be coming back in the future!

reviews.author: Cristina Simona
reviews.text: When a haircut boosts your happiness, you know you are in the right place. Taylor is amazing, she has the magic touch on my very short hair which can be really hard to cut and style, but she does it so easily and so amazingly perfectly. I love to get my cuts from her. And the salon is so cozy and comfy too. I would totally recommend Taylor and the Heart Salon to anyone looking for the perfect stylist.

reviews.author: Stephanie Julitz
reviews.text: The Heart Salon is the best! I have seen Taylor and Erin a number of times over the last year and recommend them both! Looking for a new stylist is daunting, and I’m so lucky to have found not only one but two trustworthy stylists here! The experience is above and beyond - from the minute you walk in it’s like getting your hair cut in a cozy living room. The pricing is extremely fair and the quality is unbeatable. The salon is a huge value add to the community as well, hosting events to support other small businesses. Can’t recommend enough!

services.name: Color Block Salon
services.address: 1255 9th Ave, San Francisco, CA 94122, USA

reviews.author: sgm04 gm
reviews.text: After searching for a new hair salon for a while with no success due to appointment availability and prices, I came across with Color Block Salon and I'm so glad I found this salon! no only they have amazing availability but also great pricess. I wanted to get a balayage and OMG I couldn't be more happy, John is an expert and both John and Linh are absolutely amazing and super friendly! The whole appointment was absolutely amazing. I was able to book an appointment super fast, John and Linh are super friendly, we had an awesome conversation  during whole appointment and they made me feel so comfortable. My hair came out excatly how I wanted and I couldn't be more happy! Color Block is my new salon for sure. I'll 100% recommend this salon! Best hair salon in the inner sunset

reviews.author: Camille M. H. Dela Cruz
reviews.text:
I had an amazing experience at ColorBlock Salon! From the moment I walked in, until I checked out, I was treated with amazing hospitality and kindness.
John was amazing and extremely gentle when handling my hair and Lin was sweet, offering me coffee and snacks. I came in and have always difficulty with finding a stylist who would be able to handle my difficult hair. Last time I asked someone to style it, it was 3 colors. This time, the end result is a dream, and I cannot recommend them more!
I highly recommend color correction! Will 100% come back.

reviews.author: Alex Berg
reviews.text: Linh and Jon are amazing!!! I have really thick asian hair so I wanted to find a hairstylist familiar with that for my balayage. Jon is AMAZING, his balayage made me audibly gasp when I saw the results in the mirror. He was great about educating me about the realistic color I'll get from the balayage and it came out so beautifully, I still get compliments months later! Linh is equally as amazing at manicures and pedicures, her attention to detail and care shows up in every nail. I got a regular manicure and a gel manicure and both came out flawlessly. She shaped my nails so well and painted them with expertise. My nail polish lasted so long because of her hard work. They are both very friendly and love to chat. They are my go-to people now for any self care day.

reviews.author: Jules
reviews.text: I’ve had my hair done by several stylists over the years but no service compares to that of John and Linh at Color Block. I’ve gotten my hair done with them three times now and of all those times I’ve always walked out of the salon feeling amazing and pleased with the results. The first time I came around, I had gotten a hair cut and consultation for my hair color. For the second appointment John did a root touch up on an at home bleach job as well as freshen up the red burgundy color I had. He did great at blending my colors and toning the parts I had left uneven. For my third most recent appointment John and Linh were able to accommodate me at short notice so I was super grateful for that. I had asked John to take my red hair color back down to a natural chocolate cherry brown (I was going on vacation and didn’t want red hair dye to bleed into pools/the ocean 😭) and a do a trim. John does his best to try and accommodate your requests. I enjoyed all of my experiences with them and I will definitely be back again soon :) yes, highly recommend this neighborhood gem!

reviews.author: anastasia yang
reviews.text: My FAV place to go for my hair. I have been here 3 times now and the owners, John & Linh, always do a fantastic job with my hair! Each time they were able to give me exactly what i wanted from the inspo pictures i shared and quality service. Finding a hair stylist who you can trust is hard, but they make it very easy!

services.name: Maisonry Salon
services.address: 3412 22nd St, San Francisco, CA 94110, USA

reviews.author: Wendy K.
reviews.text:
Maisonry is a world-class salon disguised as a tiny nook in the Dolores Heights neighborhood of San Francisco. Each of the stylists and colorists here is super talented, keeping tabs on all the latest trends and staying educated about the best emerging hair products. Their product lines are curated with intention and high standards. The space is stylish but welcoming, and the team is incredibly attentive without being pretentious.
Angela's color work, in particular, is next-level (natural, dimensional, and flawless), and everything grows out effortlessly. You can tell there's a real mastery of craft here. Maisonry is a a true gem for anyone who values great hair, talented technicians, and a luxury experience that still feels personal.

reviews.author: Carolyn L.
reviews.text: I was an admirer of Angela’s work for years and finally got off her waitlist a few years ago when I decided to start coloring my hair, and it was completely worth it. She is an exceptional colorist and I trust her judgment fully. She always knows exactly what to do and consistently delivers a look that feels natural with a subtle edge, which is exactly what I want. Angela is warm, personable, and clearly puts a lot of thought and care into her craft. Maisonry is a beautiful, welcoming space, and I cannot recommend Angela highly enough.

reviews.author: Brit McCoy
reviews.text: The Maisonry Salon is such a GEM! The cutest aesthetic with the kindest and most talented stylists (and who can forget Banks - the staple “salon pup”). I started coming here after continually clicking on Instagram photos Andrew had posted. He is now my stylist for life and I truly cannot recommend him enough. He is a master at what he does and always cares about what is healthiest for your hair while also reaching your goals. In a bustling city where people are often just numbers rather than human beings - they all care about each of their clients and a truly wonderful experience. If you are reading reviews trying to decide if you should book an appointment, do it!

reviews.author: Eileen Buenviaje Reyes
reviews.text: The salon has a cozy, welcoming vibe and great products — it always feels like a relaxing place to land. I’ve been coming here for years, and Amy is the reason. She’s been my stylist for 20+ years and is amazing at suggesting styles that fit your hair type and comfort level. I’ve had everything from very short cuts to long textured styles, and she nails it every time. Highly recommend this salon and Amy in particular.

reviews.author: Rochelle Kirkham
reviews.text: The Maisonary is an exceptional salon. The space is stunning, the energy is always relaxing, and every visit feels like such a treat. My stylist, Andrew, is truly a gem, he has an incredible eye for detail and consistently creates results I love, even with little to no direction. I highly highly recommend this salon!

services.name: Little Sparrow salon & barber
services.address: 1714 Hayes St, San Francisco, CA 94117, USA

reviews.author: nik cost
reviews.text: Little Sparrow has a lot of personality and very chill, with many good stylists there. Andrea has cut and styled my hair many times now. I always feel lifted when I see the result. Perfect and still looking good as it grows between visits. Love it there. Judea keeps it so pretty.

reviews.author: Noa Olson
reviews.text: I can’t say enough good things about Andrea at Little Sparrow Salon. She’s hands down the best stylist I’ve ever gone to — and somehow still insanely affordable. She’s so friendly and genuinely fun to chat with, which makes every appointment feel like catching up with a friend. The salon itself is adorable, cozy, and super welcoming. I actually look forward to my haircut every few months because it’s always such a great experience. Highly recommend Andrea if you want a stylist who’s talented, warm, and makes you feel completely at ease

reviews.author: Justin Lew
reviews.text: I’ve been a patron here since they opened, and I’ve had nothing but good experiences. My barber, Andrea, is always so warm and welcoming, and seeing her is genuinely a highlight of my month. Her cuts are consistent, and she’s great with feedback. I’ve also had a few cuts from Audra and Judea, both are super skilled and just as personable. Highly recommend this place.

reviews.author: Alison Winters
reviews.text: I love having such a cute hair salon right in my neighborhood! The space is welcoming, stylish, and has a great vibe. Andrea is especially skilled—she really listens to what you want and delivers beautiful results every time. You can tell she takes pride in her work and pays attention to detail. Highly recommend this salon, and especially Andrea, if you’re looking for someone talented and trustworthy!

reviews.author: Aaron Phillips
reviews.text: I have been going to the Little Sparrow Salon and Barber since they opened, and their staff is wonderful and I always get compliments from my friends and co-workers after my hair cuts. I am so very grateful to them. Judea the owner always finds a way to accommodate my busy schedule. I would highly recommend Little Sparrow Salon.

services.name: Yo Yo Salon
services.address: 4409 California St, San Francisco, CA 94118, USA

reviews.author: Samantha Zubko
reviews.text: Helen is an absolutely amazing hair stylist - I cannot thank her enough for how she transformed my hair. When I first moved to NYC my hair needed a major overhaul and Helen was able to do just that. I am not great with hair, so I completely trusted Helen and her opinion on what needed to be done. I would go in for my cut & color, she would do her thing, and every single time it came out flawless. Every time I would see Helen I was even more pleased then the time before. Not only is she an amazing hair stylist she is also a genuine and kind person who only wants the best for her clients and their hair. I cannot speak highly enough about Helen and recommend her to anyone I know. NYC will miss you dearly Helen!! ❤️

reviews.author: Christine Chen
reviews.text:
** Please note this review is for Helen only, not Yo Yo!**

I cannot say enough about Helen! I originally got my hair done with her in NYC and was so bummed out when she moved to SF. Yo Yo has a gem on its hands as Helen works hair magic!

She not only saved my damaged hair, but she color corrected my hair and did a beautiful job on blending all the colors together. She took the time to understand what I wanted and thoroughly explained how she was going to improve my hair's condition.

You can't find anyone else more REAL & HONEST than Helen. I can go on and on about how satisfied I am with my hair, but I'll let the pictures do the talking! :)

reviews.author: Alix Jeffrey
reviews.text: I came here to get a haircut and highlights. I have been getting my hair done by a friend the past 2 and a half years before I came here. I wanted to go to a place that is close to my house I am so happy I found Joanne, she listened to what I wanted and did what I told her what I said I liked. I got 4 inches cut and got long layers as well highlights on top. I was done within 2 and a half hours. I will definitely come back!

reviews.author: Nadya Mitchener
reviews.text: Helen is a true master of her art. Not only I had fun watching her in action, the results were also amazing. She was able to correct different shades of blonde and send me out with a healthier shiny hair, great haircut, and the whole new level of self-esteem. I also really appreciated her being up front with how much it was going to cost me. Helen's prices are slightly higher than I usually pay for salon highlights and haircut, but the results are 100% worth it.

reviews.author: Rachel Creed
reviews.text: Helen is great! So glad I found someone in SF that is an expert with blonde balayage on asians. I had gotten a balayage from 2 other stylists, the last in Solano. I loved the color but the roots weren’t done and there was no color melt from roots down. Helen suggested I come back in Dec vs Oct when I recently got my hair done, otherwise I’d fry my hair. She is honest, asks the right questions, and very detailed. So happy with the results- now my roots have the balayage, she toned all over and provided a complimentary treatment bc my hair was so dry and processed from before. She is also easy to talk to or sit comfortably in silence. I personally don’t like chatting for 4 straight hours. Thank you Helen!! Will be back again in April:) (Last photo looks more yellow due to lighting, but it’s a softer warm blonde in person, like the first 2 pics)

services.name: Z Touch Salon
services.address: 1930 Ocean Ave, San Francisco, CA 94127, USA

reviews.author: Ami Wu
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience at this salon. Star was incredibly kind, welcoming, and attentive from start to finish. He took the time to really listen to what I wanted and made sure I felt comfortable throughout the appointment. He even offered refreshments, which was such a thoughtful touch and made the experience feel relaxing. It’s clear he genuinely cares about his clients and takes pride in his work. The salon has a clean, calm, and inviting atmosphere. I left feeling refreshed, confident, and very happy with my hair. I would absolutely recommend booking with Star!

reviews.author: Jonathan Wong
reviews.text:
Star did an amazing job with my perm and hair cut. It came out exactly like I wanted from what I showed in my reference pics.

Salon is also clean and comfortable. The skylight over the hair washing station is nice. Overall a very nice vibe.

Definitely will return in the future! Amazing work!

reviews.author: Bruce Bai
reviews.text:
I’ve been coming to this salon for five years now. I first discovered this gem while living on Ocean Avenue and searching nearby spots on Google Maps. Even though I’ve since moved downtown, I still make the trip every month for Zee’s magic touch.

Zee is an excellent barber — skilled, attentive, and always open to your ideas. Over the years, I’ve tried a few different styles with him, including wavy perms, and I’ve been very happy with the results every time.

The shop itself is clean, cozy, and welcoming, with a team that’s always friendly and professional.

Highly recommend this place for your next haircut!

reviews.author: Jansen Samosa
reviews.text: Just got my second mens perm + cut from Star and he's done an amazing job each time. Best haircut I've ever gotten, other places struggle to cut my pin straight Asian hair well and make it look nice. The wave perm came out perfectly too. Would highly recommend

reviews.author: William Aquino
reviews.text: I go to Z touch for a downperm and men’s haircut every month. The staff there is so chill and up to date on current hairstyles. Only place in the bay I know of that doesn’t charge arm and leg for down perms. Zhi & Star are definitely meticulous at giving you exactly what you want. Would highly recommend

services.name: Headprint Studio
services.address: 2848 Webster St, San Francisco, CA 94123, USA

reviews.author: Benny Amon
reviews.text: Rainey has been my hairstylist for the past 6 months or so. They are so attentive and gentle and skilled. I feel safe and supported in achieving whatever vision or direction I want to go. They have a great policy of coming back within a week for a touch up/adjustment to a cut in case something wasn’t exactly to your liking and I took advantage of that for the first time today and I’m so happy with my cut. I feel like Rainey cares about the work they do and the people they service. Highly recommend for all the Amab bis and gays :)

reviews.author: Mia Caceres
reviews.text: I had such great experience with Katrina, i’ve been going to her for yearsss and she’s the only one i trust with my hair. The whole salon has a cute and welcoming vibe and everyone is super nice which is why i love coming here! I would def recommend trying out this salon and especially booking with Kat, she’s a great stylist and always does exactly what i ask for especially for curly hair and highlights.

reviews.author: Gabby Forbes
reviews.text: I booked an appointment with Chadd to help blend out some chunky highlights I had from a different salon. I wanted to add some more life and depth back into my hair. We did a quick consultation at the beginning of my appointment discussing my hair goals and he exceeded all of my expectations. I absolutely LOVE how my hair turned out. I could not be happier with the end result. He is super thoughtful, communicative, and you can tell he really cares about his work. Definitely my go-to hair stylist going forward.

reviews.author: Trinity Lucero
reviews.text: Got my haircut by Mick at the castro location. They were extremely accommodating, polite, and welcoming. Gave me a great experience and I couldn’t stop smiling because I was so happy with my haircut. Money well spent here

reviews.author: kaleena muro
reviews.text: Had a great experience courtesy of Xai. I got a wash and blowout done. Xai was very helpful, recommending and suggesting products that will help with taming my frizzy hair. Will definitely come back again

services.name: Honeycomb Salon
services.address: 3915 24th St # C, San Francisco, CA 94114, USA

reviews.author: Emily Johnson
reviews.text: Honeycomb Salon is a comfortable space with good natural light and calm energy. They stock high quality products that prioritize hair health. I see James for gray coverage and haircuts. James is excellent at his craft. He listens carefully to what I want, and he gives his professional opinion about how best to achieve that. I've never been as happy with my hair as I have been since I started going to him.

reviews.author: Brenda Marquez
reviews.text: I went in after who knows how long from my last haircut. I booked with Alex who was very welcoming and patient with me. I literally did not know what I wanted since I was just done with long hair but before starting she asked me about my everyday life. I love working out so making sure my hair was long enough to pull back. I love my hairstyle. So much easier to manage. Alex gave me recommendations on how to give my hair more volume and hide my little bald spot.

reviews.author: Nellie Tanguay
reviews.text: Great salon! I have been seeing Alex for more than a year and couldn't be happier. Alex is the best and has helped my hair journey so much. They listen to what I want while also providing tips and tricks on how to better achieve exactly what I am looking for. They truly do an amazing job and I have been so happy each and every time I go!

reviews.author: Zar Baldwin
reviews.text:
I was really excited when I found Honeycomb online as the reviews were great but unfortunately I was unable to experience the joy of a new style. Prior to booking my appointment, I called the salon to ensure they could achieve the look I wanted, dying my hair from black to chestnut brown. The person I spoke with, Danny reassured me that this was possible and James would be the best stylist for this look. He told me that following booking, the stylist would text me to discuss color and the look I wanted to achieve. Unfortunately, James only texted me to ask me to move my appt up an hour, fine not a problem.

I was running late as my uber made a wrong turn to only get a text en route from
James, saying he wouldn’t have time
for the blow out today as he had another client at 2:30. Once again, thats not problem, I can do that myself. Upon sitting down, James says what are we doing today - I show him the inspiration picture and the response is “I cant do that, I dont have time”. I proceeded to explain how I called the salon prior to ensure this was something that could be achieved and he again explains the process and that he doesn't have time to do that today as he has other clients.

This was a really disappointing experience as no solutions were offered. As someone who made an appointment and took the time to call ahead, I was made to feel as though the other clients were far more important as James said Im apologize, I dont have time for that today as I have clients, which in fact anyone who makes an appointment, is in fact a client. Though both Danny and James were apologetic, there was no sense of urgency around possibly offering other times, different days, nothing. Very sad and disappointing salon and customer service experience.

reviews.author: Audrey Gill
reviews.text:
I've been coming to Rebekah at Honeycomb for about 3 years and can't recommend her enough. My hair is not easy to cut and style- it's thick and curly, has weird cowlicks, and is generally unruly. Rebekah really took the time to get to know my hair when I first started seeing her, and took the time to get to know me and my preferences. She amazes me by taking my vague ideas for different elements of a potential cut and bringing them all together into a style that looks incredible. I've done conventional cuts and creative cuts with her and loved how they turned out.
Honeycomb has a great atmosphere. Shout out to Danny, who always goes above and beyond. Plus, scheduling is super easy.
TLDR; it's a joy to work with Rebekah, give her and Honeycomb a shot!

services.name: Edo Salon
services.address: 601 Haight St, San Francisco, CA 94117, USA

reviews.author: Catherine Zheng
reviews.text:
The staff were all kind to me and the service was good, but the haircut turned out completely different than discussed. I showed reference photos medium cut with layers that start at the mid-face. My bangs were already at the length I wanted (eyebrow) and I didn’t want them shorter. They said they would just add some face framing pieces around it to blend them in. But they cut my bangs so that the middle piece is longer than the pieces above my eyes because they thought it was cute but I’m furious because that wasn’t what I wanted??? The top layers are even shorter than my bangs and add too much volume on top. If I try to blow dry or style it just looks poofy. Then they started adding powder and texturizing products while styling and I had to stop them because I started hating the way I looked. So then we washed the products off to try to lighten the volume and it didn’t really help. I get that this is a look some people want but I did not want it. At this point my stomach was turning and I showed them the reference photo again, pointed out the differences and at least they were very apologetic and saw where they went wrong. I wanted to do something nice for myself because my birthday is next week and now I plan to wear a hat everyday for the next month. I think they’re definitely skilled and can do a mean traditional wolf cut, but it feels like they’re so used to doing the same cut that they forget about the client’s actual needs.
