If you get a cut here, PLEASE make your wants crystal clear and SPEAK UP during the cut. Specify exactly where you want your layers to start and how long you want your bangs to be. This place is too expensive to be getting a haircut you never wanted.

reviews.author: Olivia Zaid
reviews.text: I am EXTREMELY upset and disappointed with the service at Edo Salon. I booked with a stylist to get a long layered trim, and just to add some additional face framing pieces. The stylist completely botched my hair, and thinned out my very THICK, COARSE hair without my permission. The photons I provided her for reference were completely ignored, and I am so disappointed in the current state of my hair. The stylist did not even style my hair after the haircut, and she let my hair air dry, making it extremely frizzy. To top it off, I practically had to beg for a refund. Kiera, the salon owner seemed empathetic for my experience, but it was unfortunate it had to get to that point in the first place. Please save yourself a headache and never go here.

reviews.author: Brittanyana Pierro
reviews.text:
I went here for a free curly cut like 2mos ago and it was not a good experience. Even with help from the instructor my haircut turned out several different lengths, *much* shorter than I requested, and just generally not what I wanted at all. My hair is still recovering and it’s very frustrating. It’s impacted my confidence and ability to style.

If this salon advertises curly cuts, I think it’s their responsibility to make sure all stylists, including those in training, know how to care for coily, curly, and textured hair. Mind you I have 3b/3c hair. This is not a salon I recommend for Black folks, or those with textured hair beyond a soft wave.

I’ve included before and after pics below.

reviews.author: Rebecca Turner
reviews.text:
I never write bad reviews! But have been so upset all day.

I have long, slightly wavy hair. I asked for a trim and to bring out my wave a bit, and to shorten my bangs. I specified asked for NOT A SHAG cut. The stylist cut probably six inches off of my hair and gave me a shag cut, with extremely short layers all over my head. When she asked me if i liked it and i said no, it felt like all the other hairdressers turned towards me and were listening as if it were a television show. The stylist then told me i probably just didn’t know what i wanted.

I am not super precious about my hair— it grows. But this cut will probably take years to grow back the length and the cut that I had wanted. I looked at the instagram and it seems like the long shag cut is basically the only cut that this salon gives.

reviews.author: S.L. A
reviews.text:
I have been trying to find a stylist who can work with my dense, pin straight hair for a while. I usually have to go out of town or even out of country to get my hair cut properly. I also have a cowlick near my bangs that kind of is my personal enemy.

I booked an appointment with Jasiel after meeting another woman at a shop and asked her where she had gotten her haircut from. I checked out her work and it really aligned with  who I was looking for to cut my hair into a pixie. When I walked into the salon, the woman at the front desk was so sweet checking me in. The salon had such a fun aura and beautiful natural light.

Jasiel, you gave me the best haircut I have ever gotten. Her attention to detail, expertise, and patience is phenomenal. She took my vision and made it 100x better. She even taught me how to style my stubborn hair. It’s been almost a week and I will say my confidence has been sky high.

Thank you Jasiel and thank you Edo!

services.description: Creative modern hair salon including an art gallery with funky rotating local exhibits.

services.name: PATRICK EVAN SALON
services.address: 55 Grant Ave, San Francisco, CA 94108, USA

reviews.author: Iris S
reviews.text:
I’ve been trusting Patrick with my Japanese thermal and keratin treatment for over 15 years now since the Groupon days (!!!) and without his expertise, my hair would be a nightmare to manage! He knows exactly what my hair needs, and is very attentive. He doesn’t just apply, turn on the timer and then wash it off. He carefully checks your hair strand to make sure it doesn’t damage your hair. I’m always impressed by how smooth and healthy it looks and feels after every session.

Recently, I had the chance to try the collagen treatment, and I’m so happy with the results! My hair has never felt softer, and the ends are incredibly smooth. What really stands out is that my husband commented that he noticed that there was no hair falling on the floor lol, all thanks to the collagen treatment!

The last thermal I had with Patrick was almost six months ago, and had the collagen treatment almost 2 1/2 months ago. The collagen treatment complements the thermal treatment perfectly! I have not had to blow dry or use a flat iron after washing my hair and my hair dries straight, smooth and sleek, making it so much easier to manage day to day.

I can’t recommend Patrick enough! If you’re looking for someone who not only listens to your hair needs but delivers incredible results every time, he’s your guy!

P.S He also has a great team so whether you’re looking for a hair cut, hair color, keratin treatment or his new collagen treatment, come check out his salon!

reviews.author: Bernadette Tanguilig
reviews.text:
I’m long overdue in writing this review for Patrick Evans — and especially for Sara, who has been coloring my hair for the past several years.
I’ve been a loyal client since before the pandemic, and that loyalty only grew stronger during it. When salons were closed and everything felt uncertain, the team went above and beyond by delivering a custom color kit straight to my door so I could maintain my roots at home. That level of care, creativity, and commitment meant so much during such a stressful time.
Not only is Sara incredibly talented with color, she truly understands my hair and consistently makes it look amazing. She also genuinely cares about her clients and supports her fellow employees by help train aspiring colorists, which speaks volumes about her skill, professionalism, and generosity. I’ve always felt valued, listened to, and taken care of.
Patrick Evans isn’t just a salon; it’s a place that stands by its clients no matter what. I’m so grateful for the years of beautiful color and exceptional service. Highly, highly recommend!

reviews.author: Kathryn Hogan
reviews.text:
I cannot recommend Jessica highly enough. She is truly exceptional at what she does. From the moment you sit in her chair, it’s clear you’re working with someone who has both deep technical expertise and a refined artistic eye.

Jessica took the time to really understand what I wanted and then elevated it in a way I didn’t even know to ask for. Her knowledge of color, tone, and dimension is extraordinary. My hair looks natural, lived-in, and beautifully balanced, with the kind of depth and softness that only comes from a true master of the craft. The grow-out is seamless, which speaks volumes about her precision and technique.

What sets Jessica apart is her ability to blend science and artistry. She explains her process thoughtfully, makes you feel completely at ease, and is meticulous without ever feeling rushed. I trust her implicitly with my hair, whether I’m looking for a subtle refresh or a more dramatic change.

If you’re looking for a colorist who is incredibly skilled, intentional, and genuinely passionate about her work, Jessica is it. She’s a rare find, and my hair has never looked better.

reviews.author: Natasha Agbai
reviews.text:
Patrick has been doing my thermal treatments since 2008, and I cannot recommend him highly enough. He is meticulous, thoughtful, and deeply committed to doing exceptional work. On one occasion, he noticed a tiny residual bend in my hair and proactively asked me to come back so he could fix it—free of charge.

He is always learning, innovating, and trying new products to optimize results, while prioritizing hair health. It’s also clear that he cares deeply about his salon and the overall client experience. Consistently excellent work for more than a decade.

reviews.author: Chandra Patel
reviews.text:
I first walked into Patrick Evan Salon 20 years ago and Vania Avila has been doing my hair ever since. No joke, it is ALWAYS exceptional. No matter cut, color, or keratin, Vania is beyond talented.

I've been able to build a deep and trusted relationship with her and now often simply say, "hey...it's a little off. what should we do?" Vania takes care of it, and I always look like a million bucks. Seriously. I get so many compliments about my hair. Extra bonus, the entire team  at the salon is great and I can tell Patrick really cares about all the salon's clients.

Side note: The salon is a wonderful space in downtown San Francisco. Don't be afraid about coming downtown. It's very convenient whether you are already in the city or need to come in from somewhere else in the Bay.

services.name: B Parlor
services.address: 3705 17th St, San Francisco, CA 94114, USA

reviews.author: Jacob Rodriguez
reviews.text: The way she perfected my haircut was exceptional, and her clear explanations of each styling step were much appreciated. She also offered personalized tips for maintaining my new look and used top-quality products. I highly recommend Philomena for her outstanding service.

reviews.author: Tanya Saavedra
reviews.text: Philomena’s expertise and attention to detail were evident throughout my appointment. She carefully considered my current hairstyle and color preferences, providing thoughtful recommendations. The way she perfected my haircut was exceptional, and her clear explanations of each styling step were much appreciated. She also offered personalized tips for maintaining my new look and used top-quality products. I highly recommend Philomena for her outstanding service.

reviews.author: judy-b.
reviews.text: Love the new salon, love Sammy Pasion. Finally someone who understands my crazy wavy hair! Sammy's cuts look great for weeks, and her product suggestions for keeping my hair looking almost as good as it does when she styles it are right on. Everyone in the salon is friendly and welcoming, as soon as you walk in the door. I love my Sammy hair days!

reviews.author: Jessica Goodman
reviews.text:
For years I have been trying to find a colorist who was not only brave enough but also educated about dying dark (almost black) and processed/damaged hair. My younger sister went to school with Janine and had followed her hair career on Facebook - she recommended I try her since her color (on her clients and on herself) looked awesome.

I am beyond happy I listened to my sister because Janine has made my hair dreams come true. She not only safely walked me through a dramatic hair cut (I shaved half of my head) but she has dyed my dark hair silver gray, pastel pink, flame orange/red, blue, and now beautiful absinthe green. I never could have imagined my hair could be these colors! She is SO smart and understands color, my hair even fades beautifully, and truly listens to me. I appreciate her ideas/suggestions and she doesn't push products - she will totally help you find products though if you want! I highly recommend her for ANY type of color (I have seen her more natural colored hair clients too and their color is stunning) -  I never feel over charged and am always so thrilled with how pretty my color turns out.

reviews.author: Sara Alexander
reviews.text: There is simply no one like Filomena. Talented, nice, patient and I can attest to this as I’ve been going to her for 10 years. I even drive back into the city for her. She cuts my hair like no other, and is just a lovely human all around. Gorgeous new salon too!

services.name: Steel + Lacquer
services.address: 14 10th St, San Francisco, CA 94103, USA

reviews.author: Gianna Cecchetti
reviews.text: I got to do a balayage, glaze and styling with Bethany!! She did an amazing job! This will be my wedding hair color! She was very patient and listened to what I wanted and what my concerns were. She took her time, was very thorough and she was also very friendly! She also gave me an amazing hair massage!! Absolute in love! For reference, I asked for a honey/caramel balayage.

reviews.author: Stephany Garcia
reviews.text: Saturday well spent. My stylist Jenna did a great job with my haircut. She took her time to understand what I wanted and carefully did the job. Very relaxing experience.

reviews.author: Gianna Ruiz Cecchetti
reviews.text: Jenna was amazing! She went above and beyond for my hair needs and was very friendly and welcoming! I recently just moved here from Chicago and was looking for a permanent hair stylist and I’m really glad I found her! I’m also getting married next month and this is the perfect haircut for it!

reviews.author: Ayat K
reviews.text: Chrystal is an excellent hair stylist! She listens thoughtfully and is very empathetic and caring throughout. My husband and I loved the haircut and style she gave me. The customer service at this business is also very kind from the beginning of the process to the end, and they went out of their way to offer special accommodations to give me an exceptional haircut. I also really appreciated Victoria the customer experience rep who was so proactive in accomodating things for me!

reviews.author: Jesus Escobedo
reviews.text: The experience was amazing. Bethany was super professional and really understood exactly how I wanted my hair to look. The whole appointment felt like a luxury experience and the head massage was so relaxing I could’ve honestly fallen asleep. She was thorough, detail oriented, and you can tell she truly loves what she does. My hair came out looking way better than I even expected. I couldn’t have asked for a better experience.

services.description: Upscale hair salon & barbershop with a modern, minimalist vibe & on-trend services.
